name: The Essex County Express
intro_text: The trail has led you to Dunwich — a decaying village in the hills north of Arkham. You board the Essex County Express, hoping to arrive before nightfall.

But something is wrong with the train. Cars are disappearing from the rear — swallowed by a tear in reality that is consuming the tracks behind you. You must reach the engine before the train ceases to exist entirely.
setup_instructions: All passenger cars begin revealed. Engine cars are hidden until reached.
Each round, the rearmost car is eliminated — investigators in that car take damage and are moved forward.
Investigators begin in the rearmost Passenger Car.
Goal: reach the Engine Car and stop the train before all cars are consumed.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — The train is stopped
text: With seconds to spare, you reach the engine and apply the brakes. The train lurches to a halt on the edge of the void, and the tear seals behind you.
You survive — though the rear half of the train is simply gone. Record in the campaign log: *The investigators stopped the Essex County Express.* Each investigator earns 2 bonus XP.

defeat.label: Defeat — Lost to the void
text: The tear in reality consumes the last car with you in it. You tumble through impossible dimensions before landing, battered, somewhere in Dunwich — with no memory of how you arrived.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were lost on the Essex County Express.* Each investigator suffers 1 physical trauma.
